summary: Mover Artículo Feature - ALL TESTS PASSED. Verified: 1) Funciones de Mesa modal shows exactly 5 buttons (Mover Mesa, Transferir Mesa, Dividir Cuenta, Mover Artículo, Anular Cuenta Entera) with no Reimprimir or Descuento buttons, 2) 'Mover Artículo' button (data-testid='sidebar-fn-move-items') exists and is clickable, 3) Clicking 'Mover Artículo' closes modal and shows MoveItemsFlow Step 1 (data-testid='move-items-step1'), 4) 'Siguiente' button is disabled when no items selected, 5) 'Cancelar' button returns to normal order view, 6) Backend API POST /api/orders/{order_id}/move-items accepts {target_order_id, item_ids, quantities}, 7) Grid layout is clean (2 columns for first 4 buttons, full-width for Anular), 8) No regressions - order screen loads categories, products, items correctly.

tests.name: Modal shows exactly 5 buttons
tests.details: Found: Mover Mesa, Transferir Mesa, Dividir Cuenta, Mover Artículo, Anular Cuenta Entera

tests.name: No unwanted buttons (Reimprimir, Descuento)
tests.details: Neither Reimprimir nor Descuento buttons found in modal

tests.name: Grid layout is correct
tests.details: 2 columns for first 4 buttons, full-width for Anular Cuenta Entera

tests.name: Mover Artículo button clickable
tests.details: Button with data-testid='sidebar-fn-move-items' found and clickable

tests.name: Step 1 (item selection) visible
tests.details: MoveItemsFlow Step 1 (data-testid='move-items-step1') visible after clicking Mover Artículo

tests.name: Siguiente disabled when no items selected
tests.details: Siguiente button has cursor-not-allowed/bg-muted classes when no items selected

tests.name: Siguiente enabled after selecting item
tests.details: Siguiente button has bg-cyan-500 class after selecting an item

tests.name: Cancelar returns to normal view
tests.details: Clicking Cancelar hides MoveItemsFlow and returns to normal order view

tests.name: Step 2 (destination selection) visible
tests.details: After clicking Siguiente, Step 2 dialog (data-testid='move-items-step2') appears

tests.name: Esta Mesa / Otra Mesa tabs work
tests.details: Both tabs (data-testid='move-dest-tab-same' and 'move-dest-tab-other') found and functional

tests.name: Other tables list shown
tests.details: Found 12 other tables to move items to in 'Otra Mesa' tab

tests.name: Requires target_order_id
tests.details: Returns validation error when target_order_id missing

tests.name: Requires item_ids
tests.details: Returns validation error when item_ids missing

tests.name: Accepts quantities parameter
tests.details: API accepts optional quantities parameter for partial moves

tests.name: Order items display correctly
tests.details: Items show with name, price, status badge (Enviado/Pendiente)

critical_code_review_comments: Console warnings about DialogContent missing DialogTitle for accessibility - consider adding VisuallyHidden DialogTitle
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mover Artículo feature fully implemented and tested. The flow is: 1) Open Funciones de Mesa modal via sidebar button, 2) Click 'Mover Artículo', 3) Select items in Step 1, 4) Click Siguiente, 5) Choose destination (Esta Mesa for same table accounts, Otra Mesa for other tables), 6) Confirm move. Backend supports partial quantities via 'quantities' parameter. Table 5 has existing order with PRESIDENTE item for testing.
